title: Ray's Better Sherds (broken)
description: Ever wanted more sherds, and don't have the time or energy to get more sherds, well this is your the sherd-lution!
body:
**Gives the player the ability to duplicate pottery sherds**
- using the crafting recipe of two bricks and the pottery sherd to duplicate 
- works in [3x3] crafting grid 
- works in [2x2] crafting grid

![[2x2] grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91facad21568e2bb459f6f5760d412001616d308.png)

**Experimental Update & Features**
- works with the the new flow, guster, and scrape pottery sherds

![Flow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef79158401a3227f459c83e4c2cd572cd65281ea.png)
![Guster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9d3ceb0df30c0a7ed7d253a9f6f6b2b3e4d2c8f.png)
![Scrape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bef87c1ab9d8f44ac6d72d789fe5861fec9a0681.png)
